title: tagetes laxa
intro: Tagetes laxa, also known as Mexican Marigold or Sweet Scented Marigold, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to repel insects and have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tagetes laxa include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and even show promise in fighting certain types of cancer. Tagetes laxa can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
